eval_name: Add dependencies and documentation with usethis

expectations.evidence: Line 57: use_vignette("intro", title = "Introduction to My Package"); also line 83
Lines 91-98 show dplyr::filter(data, value > threshold) and dplyr::summarise(data, mean_val = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE))
Proper use of use_package with type/min_version docs, use_readme_rmd, use_pkgdown, use_vignette, and use_import_from for selective imports. All idiomatic.
